battle.frozenAlreadyPhrase: %s is frozen and skips their turn.

ultPhrases.knight: %s raises their shield, reflecting 50%% damage for 2 turns. Defense.
ultPhrases.assassin: %s vanishes into the shadows and deals a fatal blow to %s. -%d damage.
ultPhrases.venom_blade: %s poisons the target, dealing venom damage. -%d damage.

cryomancer.frozen: %s casts Eternal Winter on frozen %s. -%d damage (x3).

ultPhrases.illusionist: %s creates an illusion, forcing %s to attack themselves. -%d damage.

battle.freeze_stack_full: Frost stacks 3/3. {target} is frozen and skips 1 turn.
battle.mana_regen_disabled: {name} cannot regenerate mana due to the aftermath of the ultimate.
battle.mana_regen_halved: {name} regenerates only {amount} mana due to the critical hit.
battle.mouse_blade_ultimate: {attacker} uses Vulnerability and deals {damage} damage, ignoring armor!
battle.mouse_antimag_ultimate: {attacker} uses Anti-Magic Strike, dealing {damage} damage (scales with target's mana).
battle.mouse_alchemist_ultimate: {attacker} uses Hellfire Cocktail, dealing {damage} damage and poisoning the target for 2 turns!
battle.mouse_shadow_ultimate: {attacker} disappears into the shadows! A devastating strike will follow at the end of the turn.
battle.shadow_attack: {attacker} emerges from the shadows and deals {damage} damage, ignoring armor!
battle.miss_mana_effect: {attacker} misses and loses 10 mana. {defender} restores 5 mana.
battle.stunned_mana_effect: {name} is stunned! Mana regeneration reduced by 50% next turn.
victory_phrases: 🎉 An incredible battle! You emerged VICTORIOUS!
⚔️ With the final blow, the enemy falls. VICTORY!
✨ An epic clash! VICTORY is yours!
defeat_phrases: 💔 In this fierce fight, the enemy was stronger. DEFEAT
😢 Alas, victory was not yours. DEFEAT
draw_phrases: 🤝 Both fighters fall simultaneously. A draw!
💥 A mutual strike – both perish. Draw.

clans.Если отметятся 10 соратников: +250 опыта: If 10 comrades check in: +250 guild experience
clans.За каждые 100 пожертвованных монет клан: For every 100 donated coins, the guild gets +10 experience.
clans.Покупка очка увеличивает бонусы для всех: Buying a point increases bonuses for all members in guild battles
clans.ВНИМАНИЕ! Расформирование клана удалит в: WARNING! Disbanding will remove all members and the guild itself. Cannot be undone. Continue?

errors.Вы уже состоите в клане: You are already in a guild
errors.Клан с таким названием уже существует: A guild with that name already exists
errors.Вы не в клане: You are not in a guild
errors.Лидер должен передать руководство перед: The leader must transfer leadership before leaving
errors.Пользователь не в клане: User is not in the guild
errors.Только лидер может изменять роли: Only the leader can change roles
errors.Только лидер может передать руководство: Only the leader can transfer leadership
errors.Пользователь не в вашем клане: User is not in your guild
errors.Сообщение не может быть пустым или длинн: Message cannot be empty or exceed 200 characters
errors.Вы не состоите в клане: You are not in any guild
errors.Только лидер может покупать очки: Only the leader can buy skill points
errors.Достигнут максимум очков для этого уровн: Maximum skill points reached for this level
errors.Только лидер может распределять очки: Only the leader can distribute points
errors.Сумма распределённых очков не равна купл: The sum of distributed points does not match purchased points
errors.Только лидер может редактировать клан: Only the leader can edit guild settings
errors.Только лидер может расформировать клан: Only the leader can disband the guild

errors.Вы уже подали заявку в этот клан: You already have a pending application to this guild
errors.Только лидер может просматривать заявки: Only the leader can view applications
errors.Только лидер может принимать заявки: Only the leader can accept applications
errors.Только лидер может отклонять заявки: Only the leader can reject applications

system_messages.Ваш клан достиг уровня {level}! Открыты: Your guild reached level {level}! New perks unlocked.

guardian.name: Guardian
guardian.active: Unbreakable – Restores 20% HP. Removes all negative effects.

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.passive: Rage – The lower your HP, the higher your damage and crit chance. Deals 10% damage to yourself on each attack.
berserker.active: Bloodletting – Lose 30% current HP. Guaranteed critical hit, +50% critical damage.

knight.name: Knight
knight.passive: Mirror Shield – Reflects 20% of incoming physical damage.
knight.active: Shield of Justice – For 2 turns: +50% reflect. Removes all negative effects.

assassin.name: Assassin
assassin.active: Fatal Strike – Guaranteed critical hit, +150% critical damage (can exceed cap).

venom_blade.name: Venom Blade
venom_blade.passive: Venomous Bite – Attacks inflict Poison (max 5 stacks). Deals 2 + Agility/5 damage per stack at end of round.
venom_blade.active: Venom Wave – Pure damage: attack + total poison damage (2 + Agility/5 per stack) + burn bonus (5→30). Ignores armor, reflect and lifesteal.

blood_hunter.name: Blood Hunter
blood_hunter.active: Blood Harvest – For 2 turns: +50% Lifesteal, +100% Critical Damage (can exceed cap).

pyromancer.name: Pyromancer
pyromancer.passive: Burning Souls – Attacks inflict Burn (max 5 stacks). Deals 2 + Agility/5 damage per stack at end of round.
pyromancer.active: Firestorm – Damage: Intellect×1.8 + stacks×2, consumes all burn stacks.

cryomancer.name: Cryomancer
cryomancer.passive: Icy Blood – Attacks accumulate Frost stacks. 3 stacks = Freeze for 1 turn.
cryomancer.active: Eternal Winter – Damage: Intellect×1.6 (×2.5 if target is frozen). Freezes the target for 1 turn.

illusionist.name: Illusionist
illusionist.active: Mirror Image – The enemy attacks itself. Damage = its attack × 2 × (1 + Int/100), minimum 12.

forge.Для какого класса создать предмет?: For which class should the item be created?
forge.Если не выберете, класс будет случайным: If not selected, the class will be random
forge.Поместите <strong>три предмета одинаково: Place three items of the same rarity into the slots and click "Forge". You will receive one item of the next rarity (e.g., three common → one uncommon).
forge.Стоимость ковки зависит от редкости резу: The forging cost depends on the rarity of the result and is paid in coins and coal.
forge.Вы можете добавить свиток, чтобы увеличи: You can add a scroll to increase the success chance (Rare +10%, Epic +20%, Legendary +30%). Base chances: Uncommon 95%, Rare 85%, Epic 75%, Legendary 65%.
forge.При неудаче все предметы и свиток теряют: On failure, all items and the scroll are lost.
forge.Поместите от <strong>1 до 5 предметов</s: Place 1 to 5 items into the slots and click "Smelt". You will receive coins, possibly gems, and coal depending on rarity.
forge.Диапазоны угля: Обычное 1-5, Необычное 1: Coal ranges: Common 1-5, Uncommon 10-15, Rare 25-45, Epic 75-150, Legendary 350-550.
forge.Внизу отображаются доступные предметы. Н: Available items are shown below. Click "Add" to place them into the slots.
forge.Предмет уже в кузнице: Item is already in the forge
forge.Предметы должны быть одной редкости: Items must be of the same rarity
forge.Вы получили {coins} монет, {diamonds} ал: You received {coins} coins, {diamonds} gems, and {steel} steel ingots
You received {coins} coins, {diamonds} gems, {steel} steel ingots, and {gold} gold ingots
You received {coins} coins, {diamonds} gems, {steel} steel ingots, {gold} gold ingots, and {rareScrolls} rare scrolls
You received {coins} coins, {diamonds} gems, {steel} steel ingots, {gold} gold ingots, {rareScrolls} rare scrolls, and {epicScrolls} epic scrolls
You received {coins} coins, {diamonds} gems, {steel} steel ingots, {gold} gold ingots, {rareScrolls} rare scrolls, {epicScrolls} epic scrolls, and {legendaryScrolls} legendary scrolls
forge.craft_fail: Forging failed. Items and scroll lost.

fortune.Нет билетов! Купите билеты или дождитесь: No tickets! Buy tickets or wait until tomorrow.
fortune.Вы уверены, что хотите купить {count} ло: Are you sure you want to buy {count} lottery tickets for {totalDiamonds} gems?

fortune.Каждый день даётся <strong>3 бесплатных: You receive 3 free tickets each day.
fortune.Дополнительные билеты можно купить за <s: Additional tickets can be bought for 10 gems each (max 100 tickets per day).
fortune.no_tickets: No tickets! Buy tickets or wait until tomorrow.

gems.Все покупки регулируются условиями публи: All purchases are governed by the public offer terms.
gems.Возврат средств возможен только в соотве: Refunds are only possible in accordance with the offer terms.
gems.Бонус +50% алмазов начисляется только <s: The +50% gem bonus applies only once per pack on the first purchase on this account.
gems.Покупка успешно завершена! Товар будет з: Purchase successful! The items will be credited in a few seconds.
gems.Ошибка оплаты через VK Pay. Попробуйте п: VK Pay payment error. Please try again later.
Network error. Please try again later.
gems.Подписка активирована! (зачисление через: Subscription activated! (credited in a few seconds)
gems.Награда в случае поражения:<br> +5 опыта:
Consolation reward on defeat:
+5 exp, +5 coins

helpers.Стойкость: за каждые 5 единиц защиты пол: Fortitude: Gain +5 maximum health per 5 Defense. Increases maximum health by 10%.
helpers.Магическая мощь: за каждые 5 единиц инте: Arcane Power: Gain +1 Agility and +2 Mana regeneration per 5 Intellect.

Your {className} has reached a new level!
New attribute points are available.

mint.Дневной лимит покупки угля исчерпан (ост: Daily coal purchase limit reached ({remaining} coal left)

tournament.Регистрация с 10:00 до 19:50. Снаряжение: Registration from 10:00 to 19:50. Gear is locked upon registration.
tournament.Сначала выберите класс и роль: First select a class and role
tournament.Вы записаны на турнир!: You are registered for the tournament!
tournament.Результаты появятся через несколько мину: Results will appear in a few minutes
tournament.Матчи турнира ещё не загружены. Попробуй: Tournament matches not loaded yet. Please try again later.
Daily tournament – starts at 20:00 MSK. 32 players compete.
tournament.Регистрация – с 10:00 до 19:50. Выберите: Registration – 10:00 to 19:50. Choose your class and role, gear is locked.
tournament.Турнирные очки (ТО) – начисляются за каж: Tournament Points (TP) – awarded for each placement.
tournament.Награды за турнир – монеты, алмазы, опыт: Tournament rewards – coins, gems, experience and chests based on placement.
tournament.Ежемесячный бонус – 1-3 места в сезоне п: Monthly bonus – Top 3 in the season receive a VIP Silver subscription for 30 days.
tournament.Лиги – по итогам сезона лучшие игроки пе: Leagues – Top players move up to the next league at the end of the season.
tournament.Просматривайте свои бои, анализируйте та: Watch your matches, analyze tactics, and climb the ranks!
tournament.reward_body: Congratulations! You placed {place} in the daily tournament! Claim your reward.

tower.У вас не осталось билетов на сегодня: You have no tickets left for today
tower.Каждый сезон вы выбираете одного героя,: Each season you choose one hero to climb the tower. You can only change the hero's class with a special class change ticket.
tower.Каждый день даётся <strong>10 билетов</s: You receive 10 tickets for battles each day. The ticket count resets daily.
You earn rewards for each floor victory. Enemies grow stronger and rewards improve with each floor.
tower.Воскрешение – один раз за бой при смерте: Resurrection – once per battle, upon taking fatal damage, restores some health and removes all negative effects.
tower.Неистовство нежити – наносит три удара п: Undead Frenzy – deals three consecutive magical attacks.
tower.Скорость тьмы – каждый ход наносит два у: Dark Speed – attacks twice in a row. Always acts first.
tower.Уязвимость – наносит мощный удар, игнори: Vulnerability – deals a powerful strike that ignores armor. Heals through lifesteal.
tower.Поглощение маны – каждая атака крадёт ма: Mana Drain – each attack steals mana from the target and restores your own.
tower.Антимагический удар – наносит урон, кото: Antimagic Strike – damage scales inversely with the target's mana.
tower.Неуязвимость – на 2 хода становится неуя: Invulnerability – becomes immune to damage for 2 turns.
tower.Ядовитая атака – каждый удар накладывает: Venomous Strike – each attack poisons the target for 1 turn. Deals additional damage at the end of the turn.
tower.Адский коктейль – наносит мощный урон и: Hellfire Brew – deals massive damage and poisons the target for a long duration.
tower.Призрачная тень – с высокой вероятностью: Ghost Shadow – has a high chance to dodge any attack.
tower.Исчезновение – становится невидимой на 1: Vanishing – becomes invisible for 1 turn, completely evading attacks. Then deals a devastating strike that ignores armor.
tower.Мяу! Добро пожаловать в Башню Испытаний!: Meow! Welcome to the Tower of Trials!
tower.Здесь ты встретишь сильнейших врагов, по: Here you will face the strongest enemies as you climb floor by floor.
tower.Каждый сезон ты можешь выбрать одного ге: Each season you can choose one hero to climb the tower.
tower.Выбранный класс нельзя будет поменять до: You cannot change the chosen class until the end of the season (except with special tickets).
tower.Какой класс героя ты выберешь?: Which class will you choose for your hero?
tower.class_not_selected: No class selected for the Tower. Please select a class first.
tower.tower_reward_coins: You reached floor {floor} and received {reward} coins!
tower.tower_reward_avatar: You reached floor {floor} and received a new skin!

telegram_bot.welcome:
😺 **MEOW! Welcome to Cat Fighting!**

You have entered a world where brave cats battle for the title of champion. Here you can:

⚔️ **Choose a class** – Warrior, Assassin, or Mage, each with unique abilities.
🛡️ **Equip your hero** – find and equip awesome gear.
🏆 **Fight other players** – climb the ranks and become a legend.
🔨 **Upgrade items at the Forge** – turn common items into legendary ones.
🎁 **Open chests** – earn rare treasures and bonuses.

Ready to begin? Hit the button below and show the world what your cat can do! 😼
